eas_text: A civil authority has issued A LAW ENFORCEMENT WARNING for the following counties or areas: Bradley, TN; at 10:45 AM on JUL 15, 2026 Effective until 11:45 AM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Black male, Deountray Dickey, 6 foot 1, approx. 230 pounds, ARMED AND DANGEROUS, last seen wearing a black shirt and black pants in the vicinity of Callen Lane Northwest and Paul Huff Parkways in Cleveland. He is wanted for carjacking and evading arrest. Additional info at www.clevelandbradleytnoem.gov If you see this subject, DO NOT APPROACH and call 911 immediately. If you live or work in proximity to this alert area, secure your business or home and do not answer the door for unknown persons.
